headline: Another Company Trades AI Layoffs For Stock Price
summary: It has become a pattern. A public company lays off employees and says it has found new efficiencies due to AI. Its stock trades higher immediately. This happened yesterday. headline: Elon Musk’s SpaceX Bitcoin Holdings Could Eclipse Public Companies After IPO Despite Tiny Valuation Share, Grayscale Says
